title: platystachys juncea
intro: Platystachys juncea is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is commonly known as Indian rush. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platystachys juncea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Platystachys juncea can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent.
